description_long: This modern bungalow features a spacious, open-plan layout with large glass windows and sliding doors that connect the interior to multiple outdoor living spaces. The structure is surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped gardens, including grassy lawns, trees, and flower beds. A covered patio with a glass roof provides a shaded dining area, while a sun deck with lounge chairs and a swimming pool offers recreational space. The building's exterior is finished in a combination of white and light wood paneling, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The property includes a driveway with a gate, a carport, and several outdoor seating areas. The overall design emphasizes indoor-outdoor living, with seamless transitions between the house and its landscaped surroundings.
description: A modern, spacious bungalow with large glass windows, landscaped gardens, a covered patio, sun deck, and swimming pool, finished in white and light wood paneling.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the side of the bungalow with the driveway, carport, and main entrance, as well as landscaped gardens and a covered patio area.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the rear of the bungalow, featuring the sun deck, swimming pool, and large glass windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the opposite side, showcasing the grassy lawn, outdoor seating, and the integration of the house with the garden.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the front facade with the main gate, driveway, and a clear view of the boundary wall and front landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
